on-error-propagate.doc:name: On Error Propagate
on-error-propagate.type: HTTP:BAD_GATEWAY, HTTP:BAD_REQUEST, HTTP:CONNECTIVITY, HTTP:FORBIDDEN, HTTP:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, HTTP:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED, HTTP:NOT_ACCEPTABLE, HTTP:NOT_FOUND, HTTP:RETRY_EXHAUSTED, HTTP:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS, HTTP:UNAUTHORIZED, HTTP:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorCode: "HTTP-400", errorMessage: error.exception.message, errorType: error.errorType.identifier default error.errorType.parentErrorType.identifier, description: error.failingComponent, status: "Failure" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, tracePoint: "Error", flow: flow.name, errorCode: payload.errorCode, errorMessage : payload.errorMessage, source : "CSI(Infor)", target : "Salesforce", timeStamp : now(), category: flow.name ++ ".start", additionalInfo : {errorResponse: payload}, logLevel: p('errorLogLevel'), status: "Failed" }

on-error-propagate.doc:name: On Error Propagate
on-error-propagate.type: SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY, SALESFORCE:INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS, SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT, SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE, SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED, SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED, SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND, SALESFORCE:OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED, SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED, SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT, SALESFORCE:UNAVAILABLE

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorCode: "SF-500", errorMessage: error.exception.message, errorType: error.errorType.identifier default error.errorType.parentErrorType.identifier, description: error.failingComponent, status: "Failure" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, tracePoint: "Error", flow: flow.name, errorCode: payload.errorCode, errorMessage : payload.errorMessage, source : "CSI(Infor)", target : "Salesforce", timeStamp : now(), category: flow.name ++ ".start", additionalInfo : {errorResponse: payload}, logLevel: p('errorLogLevel'), status: "Failed" }

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorCode: "SF-401", errorMessage: error.exception.message, errorType: error.errorType.identifier default error.errorType.parentErrorType.identifier, description: error.failingComponent, status: "Failure" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, tracePoint: "Error", flow: flow.name, errorCode: payload.errorCode, errorMessage : payload.errorMessage, source : "CSI(Infor)", target : "Salesforce", timeStamp : now(), category: flow.name ++ ".start", additionalInfo : {errorResponse: payload}, logLevel: p('errorLogLevel'), status: "Failed" }

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorCode: "UN-500", errorMessage: error.exception.message, errorType: error.errorType.identifier default error.errorType.parentErrorType.identifier, description: error.failingComponent, status: "Failure" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, tracePoint: "Error", flow: flow.name, errorCode: payload.errorCode, errorMessage : payload.errorMessage, source : "CSI(Infor)", target : "Salesforce", timeStamp : now(), category: flow.name ++ ".start", additionalInfo : {errorResponse: payload}, logLevel: p('errorLogLevel'), status: "Failed" }

ee:message.ee:set-payload: output application/json --- { errorCode: "APIKIT-400", errorMessage: "Bad request", errorType: error.errorType.identifier default error.errorType.parentErrorType.identifier, description: error.failingComponent, status: "Failure" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, tracePoint: "Error", flow: flow.name, errorCode: payload.errorCode, errorMessage : payload.errorMessage, source : "CSI(Infor)", target : "Salesforce", timeStamp : now(), category: flow.name ++ ".start", additionalInfo : {errorResponse: payload}, logLevel: p('errorLogLevel'), status: "Failed" }

ee:message.ee:set-payload: output application/json --- { errorCode: "APIKIT-404", errorMessage: "Resource not found", errorType: error.errorType.identifier default error.errorType.parentErrorType.identifier, description: error.failingComponent, status: "Failure" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, tracePoint: "Error", flow: flow.name, errorCode: payload.errorCode, errorMessage : payload.errorMessage, source : "CSI(Infor)", target : "Salesforce", timeStamp : now(), category: flow.name ++ ".start", additionalInfo : {errorResponse: payload}, logLevel: p('errorLogLevel'), status: "Failed" }

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorCode: "APIKIT-405", errorMessage: "Method not allowed", errorType: error.errorType.identifier default error.errorType.parentErrorType.identifier, description: error.failingComponent, status: "Failure" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, tracePoint: "Error", flow: flow.name, errorCode: payload.errorCode, errorMessage : payload.errorMessage, source : "CSI(Infor)", target : "Salesforce", timeStamp : now(), category: flow.name ++ ".start", additionalInfo : {errorResponse: payload}, logLevel: p('errorLogLevel'), status: "Failed" }

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorCode: "APIKIT-406", errorMessage: "Not acceptable", errorType: error.errorType.identifier default error.errorType.parentErrorType.identifier, description: error.failingComponent, status: "Failure" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, tracePoint: "Error", flow: flow.name, errorCode: payload.errorCode, errorMessage : payload.errorMessage, source : "CSI(Infor)", target : "Salesforce", timeStamp : now(), category: flow.name ++ ".start", additionalInfo : {errorResponse: payload}, logLevel: p('errorLogLevel'), status: "Failed" }

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorCode: "APIKIT-415", errorMessage: "Unsupported media type", errorType: error.errorType.identifier default error.errorType.parentErrorType.identifier, description: error.failingComponent, status: "Failure" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, tracePoint: "Error", flow: flow.name, errorCode: payload.errorCode, errorMessage : payload.errorMessage, source : "CSI(Infor)", target : "Salesforce", timeStamp : now(), category: flow.name ++ ".start", additionalInfo : {errorResponse: payload}, logLevel: p('errorLogLevel'), status: "Failed" }

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { errorCode: "APIKIT-501", errorMessage: "Not Implemented", errorType: error.errorType.identifier default error.errorType.parentErrorType.identifier, description: error.failingComponent, status: "Failure" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, tracePoint: "Error", flow: flow.name, errorCode: payload.errorCode, errorMessage : payload.errorMessage, source : "CSI(Infor)", target : "Salesforce", timeStamp : now(), category: flow.name ++ ".start", additionalInfo : {errorResponse: payload}, logLevel: p('errorLogLevel'), status: "Failed" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "query": "", "payload":[ { "MuleSoft_Id__c": vars.correlationId, "Source_Name_c__c": vars.logger.source, "Target_Name_c__c": vars.logger.target, ("Error_Code_c__c": vars.logger.errorCode) if(vars.logger.errorCode != null), ("Error_Message__c": write(vars.logger.additionalInfo,'java')) if(vars.logger.errorMessage != null), "Object_Type__c": "Account", "Status__c": vars.logger.status, ("Message__c": write(vars.logger.additionalInfo,'java')) if(vars.logger.message != null), "logLevel__c": vars.logger.logLevel } ], "objectName": "Error_Log__c" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.correlationId, tracePoint: "Middle", flow: flow.name, message : "Sciton Logger record creation flow through the Process API" default "", source : "CSI(Infor)", target : "Salesforce", timeStamp : now(), category: flow.name ++ ".start", additionalInfo : {requestPayload: payload}, logLevel: p('logLevel'), status: "In Progress" }
